'''Purnham''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was the target of attacks by [[BloodScar]]. It was located in the [[Purnham system/Legends|Purnham system]] and along the [[Purnham Run]].

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
